findings.description: Section title placement is inverted for the 'テストメソッド記述方法' source section. s3 (empty title) contains the introductory text that opens the section, while s4 carries the title 'テストメソッド記述方法' but only holds the code block and note. The title should be on s3 (the section opener), not on s4.
findings.source_evidence: Source heading '----------------------\nテストメソッド記述方法\n----------------------' introduces the paragraph 'JUnit4のアノテーションを使用する...' followed by the code block. The paragraph is the section entry point and should bear the heading.

findings.description: s6 carries the title 'Excelによるテストデータ記述' but its content corresponds to the '命名規約' subsection of the source. The intro paragraph for 'Excelによるテストデータ記述' (about spreadsheets being more readable than Java source code) is in the untitled s5. The title in s6 should be '命名規約'.
findings.source_evidence:
Source structure: h2 '---------------------------
Excelによるテストデータ記述
---------------------------' contains an intro paragraph (= s5 content), then h3 '========
命名規約
========' (= s6 content). The title 'Excelによるテストデータ記述' in s6 misidentifies the subsection heading.
